prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.1 kg; Height 165.7 cm; BMI 24.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.7%; 6 months ago 10.2%; 3 months ago 10.7%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 262mg/dL; 9 months ago 276mg/dL; 6 months ago 221mg/dL; 3 months ago 310mg/dL; current 221mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.3kg; 9 months ago 68.1kg; 6 months ago 70.1kg; 3 months ago 65.8kg; current 68.1kg), Height (12 months ago 165.7cm; 9 months ago 165.7cm; 6 months ago 165.7cm; 3 months ago 165.7cm; current 165.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 63U/L; 6 months ago 64U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 60U/L), AST (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 85U/L; 6 months ago 91U/L; 3 months ago 84U/L; current 90U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.5mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.8mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.1mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.1mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 399mg/g; 9 months ago 436mg/g; 6 months ago 620mg/g; 3 months ago 690mg/g; current 590mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
